description: Count failures/cancellations: increment skipped counters and per-sheet skipped_rows when translation failures or cancellations occur so progress and summary statistics are accurate.
steps: In src/stx/translate/runner.py _mark_failed(), add 'summary.skipped_rows += 1' and 'self._skipped += 1' (currently _mark_failed does NOT increment skipped counters - it only fills the status slot)
In _mark_cancelled(), add 'summary.skipped_rows += 1' and 'self._skipped += 1' (currently _mark_cancelled does NOT increment skipped counters)
Need to get the summary inside _mark_failed and _mark_cancelled: use self._summaries.setdefault(sheet, SheetSummary(sheet_name=sheet)) or self._summaries[sheet] (sheet is already computed there)
Add the summary lookup inside the self._completion_lock block to avoid race conditions
Add a test that verifies: when a translator raises an exception for a row, skipped_count is incremented and the per-sheet skipped_rows reflects it
acceptance_criteria: When a translation fails (translator raises), result.skipped_count includes that row
When translation is cancelled mid-run, result.skipped_count includes all cancelled rows
SheetSummary.skipped_rows includes failed and cancelled rows for that sheet
The invariant result.translated_count + result.skipped_count == len(doc.entries) holds
Existing runner integration tests still pass
